0.text: CA 013/2021 CA 015/2021 IGPL General Trading LLC v (1) Hortin Holdings Limited (2) Lodge Hill Limited (3) Westdene Investment Limited

2.text: THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE COURTS

8.text: (1) HORTIN HOLDINGS LIMITED (2) LODGE HILL LIMITED (3) WESTDENE INVESTMENT LIMITED

10.text: ORDER OF ASSISTANT REGISTRAR HAYLEY NORTON

11.text: UPON the Costs Judgment of Justice Roger Giles dated 6 October 2021 in Claim CFI-023-2021 (the “Costs Judgment”)

12.text: AND UPON paragraph 1 of the Costs Judgment ordering the Claimant to pay the Defendants’ costs of the proceedings to be assessed by the Registrar if not agreed

13.text: AND UPON the Order with Reasons of Justice Roger Giles dated 1 November 2021 in Claim CFI-023- 2021

15.text: AND UPON the Order with Reasons of the Chief Justice Zaki Azmi dated 21 December 2021 in Claim CFI-023-2021

16.text: AND UPON the Judgment of the Court of Appeal dated 23 March 2022 (the “Court of Appeal Judgment”)

17.text: AND UPON paragraph 3 of the Court of Appeal Judgment ordering the Appellant to pay the Respondents’ costs of the appeal to be assessed by the Registrar if not agreed

18.text: AND UPON the Defendants' Statements of Costs dated 25 August 2021, 28 March 2022 and 28 April 2022 (the “Statements of Costs”)

19.text: AND UPON the Defendants’ Application No. CA-013-2021/1 dated 20 September 2023 seeking an order for an interim payment on account of the Defendants’ costs occasioned by these proceedings (the “Application”)

20.text: AND UPON reviewing the Seventh Witness Statement of Carlo Fedrigoli dated 19 September 2023

21.text: AND UPON reviewing Part 38 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts and Practice Direction No. 5 of 2014 - DIFC Courts’ Costs Regime

23.text:
1. The Application is granted.   
2. The Claimant shall, within 14 days of the date of this Order, make an interim payment on account of costs representing $50 \%$ of the Defendants’ costs set out in the Statements of Costs in the sum of USD 139,163.165.   
Issued by:   
Delvin Sumo   
Assistant Registrar   
Date of issue: 20 November 2023   
At: 9am
